Package com.dtwthalion.ttio.exporters

Class MzTabWriter

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.exporters.MzTabWriter
public final class MzTabWriter extends Object
mzTab exporter — v0.9+. Reverses MzTabReader: takes identifications + quantifications (plus optional Feature rows) and emits a mzTab file. Both proteomics 1.0 (PSH/PSM + PRH/PRT + PEH/PEP) and metabolomics 2.0.0-M (SMH/SML + SFH/SMF + SEH/SME) dialects are supported.

Cross-language equivalents:
Python: ttio.exporters.mztab · Objective-C: TTIOMzTabWriter

Since:
0.9
